content: We can reframe zero-shot prompting as an implicit intrinsic curiosity signal for ICM-based autonomous agents, where the LLM's zero-shot ability to infer un demonstrated tasks acts as a built-in reward that guides the agent to explore out-of-distribution environments without pre-labeled demonstration data. This lets the 2025 generation of ICM autonomous agents adapt to open-ended, unseen mission objectives far faster than traditional reward-only ICM frameworks.
